jobs.title: Influencer Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: HEILBORN Marketing ist eine Influencer-Marketing-Agentur für D2C-Brands. Zu unseren Kunden zählen einige der am schnellsten wachsenden Marken Deutschlands. Wir sind ein kleines, ambitioniertes Team mit hohem Anspruch: Spitzenarbeit statt Agentur-Durchschnitt. Wir arbeiten voll remote, ohne Micromanagement, jeder trägt echte Verantwortung. Weil wir stark wachsen, suchen wir jetzt Verstärkung fürs Team. Bei uns erwartet dich eine steile Lernkurve und voller Fokus auf zwei Dinge: Influencer Marketing und KI. Aufgaben Du übernimmst vom ersten Tag an Verantwortung für eigene Kundenmarken, und arbeitest eng an der Seite eines erfahrenen Seniors: Creator-Sourcing & Discovery: die richtigen Creator
jobs.why: Your expertise in D2C ad scripts, UGC hooks, and creative strategy aligns beautifully with an influencer agency, though the German language barrier makes it a stretch.
jobs.proposal_opener: Influencer content only works if the hooks actually stop the scroll. I script high-performing UGC and ad concepts for D2C brands that turn casual views into direct-response conversions.
jobs.flags: German language required, influencer outreach heavy
jobs.summary: This position involves managing influencer marketing campaigns and creator relationships for fast-growing D2C brands. The role is fully remote within a small, high-standard German marketing agency.

jobs.title: Performance Marketing Manager / Meta Ads (m/w/d)
jobs.description: Wer sind wir? Entstanden sind wir aus Deutschlands größter Finanzbildungsorganisation. Über 250.000 jungen Menschen haben wir gezeigt, wie Finanzen wirklich funktionieren. Aus dieser Mission ist Finanzklar entstanden. Denn Wissen allein reicht nicht – die meisten Menschen scheitern nicht am Verstehen, sondern an der Umsetzung. Genau hier setzen wir an: Wir helfen ganz konkret dabei, die richtigen Finanzentscheidungen zu treffen. Ohne Provisionslogik gegen den Kunden. Ohne undurchsichtige Produkte. Sondern mit echter, unabhängiger Beratung. Unsere Mission: Gute Finanzentscheidungen dürfen nicht länger nur den Experten überlassen sein – wir demokratisieren sie. Und dafür suchen wir dich. Als P
jobs.why: While they are looking for a technical Meta media buyer, you can position yourself as the creative strategist who writes the high-converting ad copy and hooks that make their budget work.
jobs.proposal_opener: Algorithm tweaks won't save a weak ad creative. I write the high-converting Meta ad copy and scroll-stopping hooks that lower CAC and make performance campaigns highly profitable.
jobs.flags: German language required, technical media buying expected
jobs.summary: This role is responsible for setting up, managing, and optimizing Meta ad campaigns to acquire users for a major financial education platform. It combines technical campaign management with performance-driven marketing.

jobs.title: Customer Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. In a single environment, teams design and operate analytics, machine learning, and AI agents with the transparency, collaboration, and control enterprises require. Sitting above data platforms, cloud infrastructure, and AI services, Dataiku connects the full enterprise AI stack…
jobs.why: This is a highly corporate enterprise B2B SaaS role that is a major stretch, but your direct-response skills can be pitched for their customer-facing email campaigns and case studies.
jobs.proposal_opener: Your enterprise customers have incredible stories—but they need to be told with high-converting clarity, not corporate jargon. I write direct-response copy that turns customer success into a powerful engine for retention.
jobs.flags: senior corporate role, enterprise B2B focus, likely requires US time zone
jobs.summary: This role focuses on managing customer marketing and advocacy programs to drive engagement and retention for an enterprise AI platform. It involves collaborating with enterprise clients to showcase their success stories and build brand loyalty.
